message:
chore(deps): bump bumpalo 3.16.0 → 3.20.2

Patch-range bump (3.16 and 3.20 are both caret-compatible under 3.x;
Cargo.lock already resolved to 3.20.2 via transitive resolution).
bumpalo is used by fp-groupby and fp-join for scoped-arena hash-based
group accumulation.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-groupby --lib` → 65 passed, 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
